entities.description: Nitrate nitrogen (NO3-N) added to the soil for study

entities.name: AMMONIUM
entities.description: Ammonium nitrogen (NH4-N) resulting from the reduction of nitrate

entities.description: The specific soil environment where nitrate transformations were observed

entities.name: WATERLOGGED CONDITIONS
entities.description: The state of the soil following flooding which leads to anaerobic conditions

entities.name: FERRIC IRON
entities.description: The oxidized form of iron that is reduced to ferrous iron under waterlogged conditions

entities.name: CHEMICAL REDUCTION
